name: Rescoped replay
description: Attestation issued for scope 'urn:scope:read' is presented against 'urn:scope:write'. Recomputing action_ref over the presented tuple diverges from the embedded action_ref — the scope binding is broken. A conforming verifier MUST recompute over the presented tuple and reject on mismatch.
note: scope is in the action_ref preimage precisely so a rescoped presentation cannot reuse a stale reference. Normalizing-then-matching would mask the drift; fail-closed surfaces it.
